commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is appropriate; the contributor needs to add real behavior proof and then this can continue through normal maintainer review.; Cleared: The diff reuses existing internal sessions.delete and MCP-runtime cleanup paths and does not add dependencies, CI, secrets, or new external code execution. commands.review_summary:
This PR factors isolated cron delete-after-run cleanup into a shared helper, calls it from the isolated runner `finally` block, and adds a delivery-none regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: run an isolated cron job with `deleteAfterRun: true` and `delivery.mode = "none"` on current `main`, then inspect that the cron session entry/transcript remains because cleanup only runs from delivery-dispatch paths.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is appropriate; the contributor needs to add real behavior proof and then this can continue through normal maintainer review.

target.title: Clean up isolated cron sessions after runs
target.body:
Fixes #84707.

## Summary

- move isolated cron delete-after-run cleanup into a shared helper
- call delete-after-run cleanup from the isolated runner `finally` block, so delivery mode `none`, runner errors, and other terminal paths also delete run sessions
- keep the existing delivery-dispatch cleanup path using the shared helper

## Real behavior proof

- added a regression test for an isolated `deleteAfterRun: true` job with `delivery.mode = "none"`
- the test verifies the runner calls `sessions.delete` with `deleteTranscript: true` for the run-scoped cron session key after a successful run
- existing delivery-dispatch tests still prove direct/silent/text delivery cleanup paths call the same delete API

## Validation

- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/isolated-agent/run.fast-mode.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts src/cron/service.delivery-plan.test.ts src/cron/service.session-reaper-in-finally.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --pretty false --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ...changed files...`

If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve author attribution or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
target.author: turbotheturtle
